nodes.title: Petal & Stem Florist
nodes.heroSubtitle: Artisan Floral Design in Portland Since 2008

heroDescription.processed: At Petal & Stem, we believe flowers have the power to transform any moment into a memory. Our award-winning designers create stunning arrangements using locally sourced, seasonal blooms that are as fresh as they are beautiful.

ctaDescription.processed: From birthdays and anniversaries to sympathy and celebration, we have the perfect arrangement for every occasion. Same-day delivery available for orders placed before 1 PM.
